business.name: V & P Handyman Uptown Dallas

seo.title: V & P Handyman Uptown Dallas | Reliable Home Repairs & Improvements
seo.description: Expert handyman services in Uptown Dallas. From drywall repair to furniture assembly, we handle your to-do list with skill and care. Free estimates. Call (972) 843-9302.

hero.headline: Your Home’s To-Do List, Handled.
hero.subheadline: From quick fixes to full renovations, we bring craftsmanship and reliability to every job in Uptown Dallas.

featureSections.title: Skilled Repairs You Can Count On
featureSections.body: Whether it's a leaky faucet, a hole in the drywall, or a new light fixture, we treat your home with the same care we would our own. Our team brings years of experience and a keen eye for detail to every project.
bullets: Licensed and insured for your peace of mind
featureSections.cardBody: If you’re not happy, we’ll make it right. That’s the V&P Handyman promise.

featureSections.title: One Call for All Your Home Needs
featureSections.body: From mounting TVs to assembling furniture, painting rooms to fixing decks, we handle the wide range of tasks that keep your home running smoothly. Save time and hassle by hiring one reliable team.
featureSections.cardBody: No need to rent equipment or make multiple trips to the hardware store. We arrive fully prepared to get the job done right.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We’re your neighbors in Uptown Dallas, committed to serving our community with integrity and pride.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Professionals
whyChooseUs.description: With over 15 years in the trade, we have the skills to handle everything from minor fixes to major renovations.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No surprises. We provide a detailed estimate before any work begins, so you know exactly what to expect.

whyChooseUs.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: Your happiness is our priority. If something isn’t right, we’ll come back and fix it — at no extra cost.

testimonials.quote: V&P Handyman transformed our fixer-upper into a beautiful home. Their attention to detail and friendly service made the whole process stress-free.
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

testimonials.quote: I called them for a leaky faucet and ended up having them do a whole list of repairs. Fast, fair, and professional. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Mark T.

testimonials.quote: Finally a handyman who shows up on time and does quality work. They assembled my patio furniture and mounted my TV — perfect job.
testimonials.author: Amanda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Check Off Your To-Do List?
cta.subheadline: Call us today or book online for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of handyman services to keep your home in top shape. From small repairs to larger projects, our skilled team delivers quality workmanship and exceptional customer service.

services.title: Drywall Repair & Patching
services.shortDescription: Fix holes, cracks, and water damage with seamless drywall repair.
services.longDescription: Our drywall experts restore your walls to a smooth, flawless finish. Whether it’s a small nail hole or a large section damaged by water, we match texture and paint for an invisible repair.
benefits: Quick turnaround — most repairs done in one visit
Prevents further damage from moisture or pests

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We inspect the damage and measure the area to determine the best repair method.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We cut out damaged sections, install new drywall, tape, mud, and sand for a smooth surface.

process.title: Finish
process.description: We apply primer and paint to match your existing wall color, leaving no trace of the repair.

faqs.question: Can you match the texture of my existing walls?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate common textures like orange peel, knockdown, and smooth finishes.

faqs.question: How long does drywall repair take?
faqs.answer: Most small to medium repairs are completed in a single day, including drying time for joint compound.

services.title: Furniture Assembly
services.shortDescription: Professional assembly for all types of furniture — flat-pack, ready-to-assemble, and more.
services.longDescription: Save time and frustration by letting us assemble your furniture. We handle everything from IKEA bookshelves to complex entertainment centers, ensuring sturdy, safe construction.
benefits: Correct assembly prevents wobbling and damage
We dispose of all packaging materials
Faster than DIY — usually done in under 2 hours

process.title: Unboxing
process.description: We unpack all parts and hardware, checking for any missing pieces.

process.title: Assembly
process.description: Using the manufacturer’s instructions, we carefully build each piece with the right tools.

process.title: Placement
process.description: We position the furniture exactly where you want it and clean up all debris.

faqs.question: Do you assemble furniture from any store?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with all brands including IKEA, Wayfair, Amazon, and local stores.

faqs.question: What if a piece is missing or damaged?
faqs.answer: We’ll note any issues and help you request replacements from the manufacturer.

services.title: Painting Services
services.shortDescription: Interior and exterior painting with clean lines and lasting results.
services.longDescription: Transform any room or the entire exterior of your home with our professional painting services. We prep surfaces meticulously and use premium paints for a durable, beautiful finish.
benefits: No drips, streaks, or messy cleanups
We protect floors and furniture with drop cloths
Color consultation available to help you choose

process.title: Preparation
process.description: We move furniture, tape edges, patch holes, and sand surfaces for a smooth base.

process.title: Priming & Painting
process.description: We apply primer if needed, then two coats of high-quality paint for even coverage.

process.title: Cleanup
process.description: We remove tape, touch up edges, and leave the room spotless.

faqs.question: Do you provide paint or do I need to buy it?
faqs.answer: We can provide paint or work with paint you’ve already purchased. We recommend premium brands for best results.

faqs.question: How long does it take to paint a room?
faqs.answer: A standard 12x12 room typically takes one to two days, including drying time between coats.

services.title: General Home Repairs
services.shortDescription: Fixing leaks, squeaks, and everything in between — inside and out.
services.longDescription: From fixing a running toilet to repairing a loose deck board, our general repair service covers a wide range of household issues. We diagnose the problem quickly and provide lasting solutions.
benefits: Prevents small issues from becoming costly repairs
Extends the life of your home’s components

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We listen to your concerns and inspect the issue to identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Using the right parts and techniques, we fix the problem efficiently.

process.title: Testing
process.description: We test everything to ensure it works properly before we leave.

faqs.question: Do you handle plumbing and electrical repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle minor plumbing and electrical work such as faucet repairs, outlet replacements, and light fixture installations.

faqs.question: Can you repair outdoor structures like fences and decks?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We repair fences, decks, gates, and other outdoor structures.

about.headline: Your Trusted Neighborhood Handyman
about.mission: To provide Uptown Dallas homeowners with reliable, high-quality handyman services that make home maintenance easy and stress-free.
story: V & P Handyman Uptown Dallas was founded with a simple mission: bring professional, honest handyman services to our own neighborhood. We saw too many homeowners struggling with unreliable contractors or overpriced repairs, and we knew we could do better. Starting with a few basic tools and a commitment to quality, we built a reputation for showing up on time, communicating clearly, and doing the job right the first time.

Today, we’re proud to serve hundreds of families across Uptown Dallas, from the State Thomas area to West Village and beyond. Our team has grown, but our values haven’t changed. We still treat every home like it’s our own, and we’re not satisfied until you are.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We give honest advice and fair pricing — no upsells or unnecessary work.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work, using the best techniques and materials for lasting results.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up when we say we will and finish on schedule.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with the utmost respect.

contact.headline: Let’s Get Started on Your Project
contact.subheadline: Call, email, or fill out the form below for a free estimate. We’ll respond within 24 hours.
